description_en: Athens may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 97 halal restaurants and 3 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Athens, Greece, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Athens: 115 halal restaurants listed, 3 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.2/5.
